Components
All ComponentsApp ShellSidebar & TreeToolbarCanvas & PreviewAddon PanelControlsDocs PanelStatus BarStory Card

App Shell

The root layout grid that wraps every other component. Provides header, three-column workbench, and status bar.

Header

Components
Stories Docs Tests
  • Settings
<header class="cf-header">
  <a class="cf-logo" href="/">
    <span class="cf-logo-mark"><i class="bi bi-braces"></i></span>
    <span>Components</span>
  </a>
  <nav class="cf-header-nav">
    <a class="cf-header-link is-active" href="#">Stories</a>
    <a class="cf-header-link" href="#">Docs</a>
  </nav>
  <div class="cf-search">
    <div class="input-group input-group-sm">
      <span class="input-group-text bg-transparent"><i class="bi bi-search"></i></span>
      <input class="form-control" type="search" placeholder="Search stories…">
    </div>
  </div>
</header>

Workbench Grid

The .cf-workbench is a CSS grid with three columns: sidebar, center, and optional docs panel. Add .has-docs to show the right column.

.cf-sidebar
260px
.cf-toolbar
.cf-canvas
.cf-addon-panel
.cf-docs-panel
optional
<div class="cf-app">
  <header class="cf-header">…</header>

  <div class="cf-workbench has-docs">
    <aside class="cf-sidebar">…</aside>

    <main class="cf-center">
      <div class="cf-toolbar">…</div>
      <section class="cf-canvas">…</section>
      <section class="cf-addon-panel">…</section>
    </main>

    <aside class="cf-docs-panel">…</aside>
  </div>

  <footer class="cf-statusbar">…</footer>
</div>

Logo Mark

Components Design System Addon Lab 
<a class="cf-logo" href="/">
  <span class="cf-logo-mark"><i class="bi bi-braces"></i></span>
  <span>Components</span>
</a>

Classes

ClassElementDescription
.cf-appdivRoot grid — rows: header / workbench / statusbar. Sets min-height:100vh.
.cf-headerheaderSticky top bar, flex row. Receives cf-logo, cf-header-nav, cf-search.
.cf-logoaBrand link with gap between mark and name.
.cf-logo-markspanGradient icon badge — swap the Bootstrap Icons class for brand identity.
.cf-header-linkaNav pill. Add .is-active for the current section.
.cf-searchdivSearch wrapper — margin-left:auto pushes it right by default.
.cf-workbenchdivThree-column grid. Add .has-docs to reveal docs column. Add .is-fullscreen to collapse to single column.
.cf-centermainMiddle column grid — rows: toolbar / canvas / addon-panel.
.cf-statusbarfooterSlim footer bar, space-between. Left for status text, right for version.
Docs ready Components FantasyUI
